# Park Dental Clinic

> Premium dental care in Kochi, Kerala. Seven specialists under one roof, offering dental implants, cosmetic dentistry, root canal therapy, teeth whitening, braces and aligners, and routine family dental care. 4.9 rating from 868 reviews on JustDial. Located in Elamakkara, Kochi.

## Overview

Park Dental Clinic is a multi-specialty dental practice in Elamakkara, Kochi, Kerala, India. Founded and led by Chief Dental Surgeon Dr. Monish Krishnan, the clinic brings together seven dental specialists covering oral surgery, pediatric dentistry, endodontics, prosthodontics, implant surgery, and general dentistry. The clinic follows strict sterilization protocols aligned with CDC and DCI guidelines and uses modern technology including advanced rotary endodontics, digital imaging, and laser whitening systems.

## Services

- **Dental Implants:** Single tooth implants, full-arch restoration, All-on-4, immediate-load implants, and implant-supported bridges
- **Cosmetic Dentistry:** Porcelain veneers, composite veneers, smile makeovers, dental bonding, and aesthetic contouring
- **Root Canal Therapy:** Painless single and multi-visit root canal treatments using advanced rotary endodontics and digital imaging
- **Teeth Whitening:** In-office laser whitening, custom take-home whitening trays, and professional stain removal
- **Dental Braces and Aligners:** Traditional metal braces, ceramic braces, self-ligating systems, and clear aligner therapy for all ages
- **Routine Check-ups and Hygiene:** Professional cleanings, plaque and tartar removal, gum health checks, and preventive care plans

## Specialist Team

- Dr. Monish Krishnan - Chief Dental Surgeon
- Dr. Manu M. Das - Maxillofacial Surgeon
- Dr. Aswani Anil - Pedodontist (Pediatric Dentistry)
- Dr. Nikhil Julian - Endodontist
- Dr. Fouzia Ismail - General Dentist
- Dr. Mathew Jacob - Endodontist
- Dr. Layana Theodore - Prosthodontist and Implant Surgeon

## Key Information

- **Location:** Ground floor, opposite to More Supermarket, Punnackal, Elamakkara, Kochi, Kerala 682026
- **Phone:** +91 98469 18974, +91 81081 07271

- **Hours:** Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM to 7:30 PM. Sunday closed.
- **JustDial Rating:** 4.9 stars from 868 reviews
- **Booking:** Online appointment booking available at https://www.parkdentalclinics.co.in/

## Why Choose Park Dental Clinic

- Seven dedicated specialists, each with a defined role, ensuring every procedure is performed by the right expert
- Maxillofacial surgeon on team for complex surgical procedures and safety
- Dedicated pedodontist for children's dental care
- Two endodontists for specialized, painless root canal treatments
- Prosthodontist and implant surgeon for advanced implant and restoration work
- 4.9 rating from 868 reviews on JustDial reflecting years of consistent patient satisfaction
- Modern technology including rotary endodontics, digital imaging, and laser whitening
- Comprehensive family dental care from pediatric to geriatric patients
- Strict sterilization and infection control protocols
